name: @metorial/zylvie
description: Manage digital product sales, checkout flows, and subscriptions for creators and small businesses. Create, update, and delete products with configurable pricing models (one-time, subscription, delayed payments). Manage discount coupons with percentage or fixed-amount types, usage limits, and product scoping. Verify, redeem, and refund software license keys. Verify subscription status by subscriber email. Track sales events, new leads, affiliate sign-ups, and subscription lifecycle changes via webhooks.
